_comment: SYNTHETIC credit-bureau reports (mimics NCB Thailand structure). Clearly fake. Consumed by get_bureau_report tool; summarized by bureau_summary agent.

APP-1001.notes: Clean repayment history. One revolving facility utilised at 38%.

APP-1002.notes: Rapid debt growth funding project pipeline. One 30-day past-due cured within billing cycle. High inquiry velocity.

APP-1003.notes: Seasonal cash-flow stress in textile export cycle. Two late payments cured. Margins compressed in FY2024.

APP-1004.notes: Asset-backed fleet loans performing. Stable utilisation. No adverse marks.

APP-1005.notes: Stable agro-processor. Thin equity cushion but consistent servicing. Multiple short-term seasonal lines.
